results.title: Frederick Book Arts Center hosts exhibitions on printing and press freedom in Maryland
results.description: Enlarged quotations from America’s founders and later political leaders fill a gallery wall inside the spacious Frederick Book Arts Center in downtown Frederick.

results.title: St. Peters's sizzles through 60th annual art show
results.description: Joan Rumenap and Jayne Barnhardt made their way around the 60th annual St. Peter's Art Show trying to stay cool, but looking for hot bargains. "We definitely made some purchases," Rumenap said. She showed off note cards with sailboats and wood from old furniture repurposed into a coat rack. They were among the patrons who spent part of July Fourth checking out works from painters, metalworkers and jewelrymakers.

results.title: Leigh-Anne Pinnock reveals she is pregnant with third child with husband Andre Gray
results.description: Leigh-Anne used the last song of her debut solo album My Ego Told Me To, 'Heaven' on the pregancy announcement

results.title: Watch CNBC's Fed roundtable discuss the latest FOMC minutes
results.description: Jefferies' David Zervos, CNBC's Steve Liesman and Rick Santelli discuss the latest FOMC minutes.
